title: Editable PDF highlights: round caps match plan view
description:
Editable Highlights download now uses a round-cap /AP appearance stream (PDF operators 1 J / 1 j) matching plan-board SVG stroke-linecap="round". /LE Round did not match on-screen shape. Full InkList is kept for Adobe endpoint editing; BS is omitted so only the AP stroke renders (no square-cap InkList layer).

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy. Download plans → Editable Highlights and compare line ends to plan view.

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Editable download: /AP round-cap stroke matching plan view SVG.
Remove ineffective /LE Round on Ink annotations.
Keep full InkList for Adobe editability; drop BS when AP attached.
Mirror dedupe fix retained (dbg42). Cache bust dbg44.
